heroDescription: Collaborative photo album and automatic generation of your personalized Travel Book.

travelBook.title: Your personal Travel Book
travelBook.subtitle: AI compiles your best moments into a beautiful travel book
travelBook.introText: 12 unforgettable days through the land of the rising sun...
travelBook.day1Text: Culture shock right from the airport exit. The neons of Shinjuku, the orderly crowd, and that first ramen at 2am...
travelBook.day2Text: Early wake up for Senso-ji temple. The incense, the morning prayers, then off to Harajuku for the ultimate contrast...
travelBook.day3Text: The Shinkansen speeds at 300km/h. Arrival in Kyoto under light rain. The bamboos of Arashiyama in the mist, a suspended moment...

features.title: More than a photo album

cta.title: Ready to immortalize your adventures?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of travelers who preserve their memories with WePlanify.

faq.question: How do I add photos to my trip?
faq.answer: During or after your trip, simply add your photos and videos to each day or place in your itinerary. The app automatically organizes your media by date and GPS location.

faq.question: Can I create a shared album with my group?
faq.answer: Yes! All trip participants can contribute their photos. The collaborative album builds automatically and everyone can see each other's memories in real-time.

faq.question: How does the automatic recap work?
faq.answer: At the end of your trip, AI generates a 'Travel Book' with your best photos, a map of your journey, statistics (km traveled, countries visited) and highlights.

faq.question: Can I share my memories publicly?
faq.answer: You choose: keep your memories private, share them only with your group, or publish them on your public profile to inspire other travelers.

faq.question: Are photos stored in high quality?
faq.answer: Yes, we keep your photos in original quality. You can download them at any time or export them to Google Photos, iCloud or Dropbox.
